title: senecio fruticulosus
intro: Senecio fruticulosus, also known as annual burnet or small burnet, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant contains hepatotoxic pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their purported medicinal properties, including treating liver and gallbladder issues. However, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and other health problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Senecio fruticulosus is often used as an infusion or tincture to treat various health conditions, but its use should be strictly regulated and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
